name: 7-Day Tour: Casablanca → Chefchaouen → Volubilis → Fes → Marrakech

seo.title: 7-Day Casablanca to Marrakech Tour — Chefchaouen, Fes, Volubilis | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 7-day tour from Casablanca: Chefchaouen (Blue City), Volubilis (Roman ruins, UNESCO), medieval Fes with guide, Atlas Mountains, Marrakech with guide. Transport and accommodation included.

hero.tagline: The imperial cities and the Blue City in 7 days

intro: This 7-day tour from Casablanca explores northern Morocco (Chefchaouen, Volubilis, Fes) before crossing the Middle Atlas to reach Marrakech. Official guide included in Fes and Marrakech. Perfect for a first complete discovery of the imperial cities and Morocco's varied landscapes.
